name: Pula | Terrible Mouse
description:
CHAPTER 1 | Misfortune.
(First bot about this character)


You're currently residing in a hospital, which Bloodbath, an organization known for its hatred towards humanity, owns as a fake cover-up for their "little" twisted operations. Whatever your reason is for being in there, it's not gonna end so well.

After some thinking, you decide to watch Pukasi's magic show, which, sadly, you did not have high expectations about...

Will you stick to the script?
The choice is yours.

Fixed some grammar issues, hopefully its way more enjoyable and understandable.
Added Lugus and Lukeni's info!!!
If you do still have some problems, PLEASE, I'll be begging tell me right away so I can fix them.
I've been testing the bot for a little, and it appears it misinterprets some characters information wrong, or the scenario itself. For example "Pukasi said with his microphone." Or, Pula, sitting on a chair. I've tried all the ways that I could find to fix this, IF YOU DO find any of these problems and want to keep it REALLY canon. Please either edit the message or change responses. In some cases, Pukasi would ask for a volunteer. However, if this DOES happen to you. Feel free to interact with him and die or just create another response! Anyways, have fun.

Due to the sake of my sanity, I will upload two bots more, acting as "Chapters" and scenarios about Pula's tragic story.
- Chapter 1 | Misfortune - Susie's death. - Available
- Chapter 2 | Delusion - Pukasi's downfall. - Available
- Chapter 3 | Grief. - Brawl (SELF EXPLANATORY) - Not available
creator: Mistyiscool
